title: SpecGroupPreMigration
description: Permissive schema used ONLY by migrate-manifest.mjs for input parsing. Accepts BOTH legacy-flat (top-level prd_id, prd_path, prd_version, prd_content_hash, spec_group_id) AND canonical nested shapes. Post-migration output always conforms to the canonical strict schema (spec-group.schema.json).

spec_group_id.description: LEGACY-FLAT marker — migrated OUT by migrate-manifest.mjs. Duplicates `id`.

prd_id.description: LEGACY-FLAT marker — migrated into nested prd.id by migrate-manifest.mjs.

prd_path.description: LEGACY-FLAT marker — migrated into nested prd.file_path by migrate-manifest.mjs.

prd_version.description: LEGACY-FLAT marker — migrated into nested prd.version by migrate-manifest.mjs.

prd_content_hash.description: LEGACY-FLAT marker — migrated into nested prd.content_hash by migrate-manifest.mjs.

prd.description: Canonical nested PRD link. May co-exist with legacy-flat prd_* fields during migration; migrate-manifest.mjs merges/rejects per AC-4.8.

updated_by.description: Permissive enum — accepts legacy `user` for migration input. Migrate-manifest.mjs rewrites `user` -> `human`.

convergence.description: Pre-migration is PERMISSIVE on convergence subfields: legacy *_clean_pass_count subfields are accepted here, then stripped by migrate-manifest.mjs (AC-1a.*).
